name: discord-code-format-bot
description: Discord.js bot that formats code from !fmt messages.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/formatService.js && node --check src/webServer.js && node --check src/formatters/prettierFormatter.js && node --check src/formatters/pythonFormatter.js && node --check src/formatters/clangFormatter.js && node --check src/formatters/csharpFormatter.js
